working_on: Cadence-fired project health-check audit (S-0184 → S-0203 audit window; interactive inline adjudication per ADR 0057 revised Decision 1).
declared_scope: Run the cadence-fired health-check audit per engine/operations/health-check.md: scan_orphans output, engine_memory pushback+lesson content reads, freshness probes (engine_memory / validator acted-on rate / hooks / supabase / registries), adversarial-stance posture findings (Fit / Gaps / Infrastructure-without-function / Bloat), ≥1 non-obvious finding + ≥1 affirmative retire candidate + forward-fit map + cold-context probe. Inline user adjudication via AskUserQuestion; accepted findings file Issues / make inline fixes in same session. Author docs/health-checks/S-0204.md against docs/health-checks/TEMPLATE.md (hand-authored). Bump last_audit_session via health_check.py --bump-only. phase: NA-health-check
outcome_summary: S-0204 cadence-fired project health-check audit complete. Natural-cadence fire (slots_since 20 == cadence 20); interactive inline adjudication per ADR 0057 revised Decision 1. Four findings surfaced + executed in-session: (A) ADR 0091 retirement-residue cluster — 243 lines stripped from session-start.sh + chromadb/mempalace probing removed from probe_versions.py + diary_pending_index.json deleted + 4 stale log files deleted (commit 435c789); (B) validator_runtime_phase_regression structurally inoperative — filed as Issue #150; (C) 2 stale 0700-perms worktrees (cranky-fermat + zealous-wright) removed inline (git-invisible); (D) S-0198 changelog entry compressed 56 → 50 lines under soft cap. Audit report at docs/health-checks/S-0204.md (207 lines, all 14 TEMPLATE sections); per-session changelog at engine/changelog/2026/S-0204-health-check-audit.md; lesson drawer 7b9fc34d (ADR demolition-pass criteria pattern). The S-0184 → action pipeline closed end-to-end across the audit window (Issues #131/#132/#133 all closed via ADR 0091 / ADR 0092 / annotated-baselines bucket). Persistent-warn surface healthy: 1 action-needed (cleared by Finding D) + 3 annotated baselines, dramatic improvement over S-0184's 22-of-30 saturation. Cadence kept at 20; re-evaluate at S-0224 (or sooner if Issue #150 fix produces real signal). Cold-context probe on randomly-picked ADR 0076 (seed 20204): no compound drift. last_audit_session bumped S-0184 → S-0204 via health_check.py --bump-only per ADR 0022 S-0149 amendment. Next session: user picks PDG papers extraction Session δ₃+ (Cluster 1 Contestability substrate ADR) or Issue #150 investigation.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — declared scope (cadence-fired audit per engine/operations/health-check.md with adversarial-stance posture, freshness probes, ≥1 non-obvious finding, ≥1 retire candidate, forward-fit map, cold-context probe, inline user adjudication, hand-authored docs/health-checks/S-0204.md, last_audit_session bump) delivered completely. Four findings adjudicated inline + executed: A (inline residue cleanup), B (Issue #150 filed), C (inline worktree removal), D (inline changelog compression).

side_discoveries.reasoning: False positive — 'pending' appears in commit prose describing the *retired* 'Pending mempalace diary writes' section name (a sub-section of session-start.sh that was deleted in this very commit). Not a deferred follow-up; the substrate the section served retired per ADR 0091.

False positive — 'pending=[]' appears in commit prose describing the empty 'pending' JSON array field of the retired engine/session/diary_pending_index.json file (deleted in this very commit). Not a deferred follow-up; the index's recovery mechanism retired per ADR 0091.
